description: NinjaTrader 8 is running on the Windows desktop. You need to set up a Market Replay (Playback) session to practice trading on historical data. Connect to the Playback Connection and set the session date to January 16, 2024. Open a Daily chart for 'SPY' and add an Exponential Moving Average (EMA) indicator with a period of 20. Save the workspace to persist the setup. You do not need to start the playback.
